nasb.text: He stretched out the form of a hand and caught me by a lock of my head; and the Spirit lifted me up between earth and heaven and brought me in the visions of God to Jerusalem, to the entrance of the north gate of the inner court, where the seat of the idol of jealousy, which provokes to jealousy, was located.

esv.text: He put out the form of a hand and took me by a lock of my head, and the Spirit lifted me up between earth and heaven and brought me in visions of God to Jerusalem, to the entrance of the gateway of the inner court that faces north, where was the seat of the image of jealousy, which provokes to jealousy.

cnv.text: 他伸出一隻形狀像手的東西，抓住我的一綹頭髮；靈就把我提到天地之間，在　神的異象中，他把我帶往耶路撒冷，到聖殿北門內院的入口處，在那裡有令　神憤恨的偶像的座位，就是觸動　神憤恨的。

ccb.text: 祂好像伸出一只手，抓住我的头发。在异象中，灵把我举到天地之间，将我带到耶路撒冷圣殿内院的北门，那里供奉着惹耶和华愤恨的神像。
